name: Zero Risk — NEXUS 7-Phase Campaign Orchestrator (Webhook)
description: Entry point for campaign requests. Orchestrates full NEXUS pipeline: DISCOVER → STRATEGIZE → SCAFFOLD → BUILD → HARDEN → LAUNCH → OPERATE. Each phase invokes jefe-marketing agent, validates output via Evidence Collector, retries up to 3x on failure, escalates to HITL on 4th failure. Writes phase state to Supabase campaign_pipeline_state. Publishes phase-complete events for Mission Control consumption.
trigger: Webhook POST /webhook/campaign-orchestrator with { client_id, campaign_brief, priority }
kpis: Phase completion rate (% of campaigns reaching OPERATE)
Phase retry frequency (avg retries per phase)
